# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/xinzhu/sentry_ws/build/armor_detector
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Generate environment files in the CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX
AMENT_CMAKE_ENVIRONMENT_GENERATION:BOOL=OFF

//Generate environment files in the package share folder
AMENT_CMAKE_ENVIRONMENT_PACKAGE_GENERATION:BOOL=ON

//Generate marker file containing the parent prefix path
AMENT_CMAKE_ENVIRONMENT_PARENT_PREFIX_PATH_GENERATION:BOOL=ON

//Replace the CMake install command with a custom implementation
// using symlinks instead of copying resources
AMENT_CMAKE_SYMLINK_INSTALL:BOOL=1

//Generate an uninstall target to revert the effects of the install
// step
AMENT_CMAKE_UNINSTALL_TARGET:BOOL=ON

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

//Dependencies for the target

rospection_cpp;general;visualization_msgs::visualization_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp;general;visualization_msgs::visualization_msgs__rosidl_generator_py;general;message_filters::message_filters;general;cv_bridge::cv_bridge;general;image_transport::image_transport;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp;general;auto_aim_interfaces::auto_aim_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py;general;tf2::tf2;general;tf2_ros::tf2_ros;general;tf2_ros::static_transform_broadcaster_node;general;rm_utils::rm_utils;general;rm_utils::fytlogger;general;opencv_calib3d;general;opencv_core;general;opencv_dnn;general;opencv_features2d;general;opencv_flann;general;opencv_gapi;general;opencv_highgui;general;opencv_imgcodecs;general;opencv_imgproc;general;opencv_ml;general;opencv_objdetect;general;opencv_photo;general;opencv_stitching;general;opencv_video;general;opencv_videoio;general;g2o_core;general;g2o_stuff;general;g2o_solver_csparse;general;g2o_types_sba;general;g2o_types_slam3d;general;g2o_solver_dense;general;fmt::fmt;general;tbb;
